title: Learning from Home: The New Way of Education
passage:
Learning from Home: The New Way of Education

Today, many students around the world do not go to a traditional school building every day. Instead, they study at home using a computer. This is called online learning, or distance education. To start online learning, a student only needs three basic things: a computer or a tablet, a webcam, and a good internet connection.

There are many benefits to learning from home. First, students can save a lot of time. They do not need to travel by school bus or car in the morning. Second, online learning is very flexible. Students can choose when to study. For example, some students like to study early in the morning, while others prefer to study in the afternoon. They can also learn at their own speed. If they do not understand a lesson, they can watch the teacher's video again.

However, online learning also has some difficult parts. One common problem is the internet connection. If the internet stops working, students cannot join their live classes. Another problem is that students can feel very lonely. They do not see their friends face-to-face every day. They cannot play sports or talk in the schoolyard during break time. This makes them feel sad sometimes.

Teachers also have to work in a new way. They do not stand in front of a real blackboard. Instead, they make digital presentations and share worksheets on the internet. They use emails and chat apps to talk to parents and students. Many teachers think online learning is useful, but they still prefer to see their students in a real classroom.

In conclusion, online learning is a great tool for modern education. It helps many people get an education from anywhere in the world. In the future, more schools will probably use a mix of both online classes and real classroom lessons.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What do students need to start online learning?

options.B: A computer and a good internet connection.

questions.explanation: The passage states: 'To start online learning, a student only needs three basic things: a computer or a tablet, a webcam, and a good internet connection.'

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: Why do students save time with online learning?

options.C: They do not need to travel to school.

questions.explanation: The text says: 'First, students can save a lot of time. They do not need to travel by school bus or car in the morning.'

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What can students do if they do not understand an online lesson?

options.C: Ask their parents to do it.
options.D: Go to a real school immediately.

questions.explanation: The text states: 'If they do not understand a lesson, they can watch the teacher's video again.'

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: How do teachers talk to parents and students?

options.A: By calling them on a landline phone.
options.D: By using emails and chat apps.

questions.explanation: The text states: 'They use emails and chat apps to talk to parents and students.'

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE, FALSE, or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: Online students must study only in the morning.
questions.explanation: The text says: 'Students can choose when to study. For example, some students like to study early in the morning, while others prefer to study in the afternoon.'

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE, FALSE, or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: Students can feel lonely because they do not see their friends face-to-face.
questions.explanation: The text says: 'Another problem is that students can feel very lonely. They do not see their friends face-to-face every day.'

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE, FALSE, or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: Online learning is more expensive than traditional school.
questions.explanation: There is no information in the passage comparing the cost of online learning and traditional school.

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE, FALSE, or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: Teachers stand in front of a real blackboard during online classes.
questions.explanation: The text states: 'They do not stand in front of a real blackboard. Instead, they make digital presentations...'

questions.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: If the ______ stops working, students cannot join their live classes.
questions.explanation: The text states: 'If the internet stops working, students cannot join their live classes.'

questions.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: Students cannot play sports or talk in the ______ during break time.
questions.explanation: The text states: 'They cannot play sports or talk in the schoolyard during break time.'

questions.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: In the future, schools will probably use a ______ of online and real classroom lessons.
questions.explanation: The text states: 'In the future, more schools will probably use a mix of both online classes and real classroom lessons.'

vocabulary.meaning: following ideas or methods that have existed for a long time
able to change easily to fit different situations
sad because you are not with other people

tactics:
Hướng dẫn làm bài đạt điểm cao (A1-A2)

1. Tìm từ khóa trực tiếp: Ở trình độ này, các câu hỏi sử dụng từ ngữ giống hệt trong bài đọc. Hãy tìm các từ khóa nổi bật như 'internet', 'schoolyard', 'emails' trong bài đọc để tìm ra đáp án nhanh nhất.

2. Phân biệt True/False/Not Given: Nếu thông tin trong câu hỏi ngược lại với bài đọc, chọn FALSE. Nếu thông tin không được nhắc đến (ví dụ như học phí đắt hay rẻ), chọn NOT GIVEN.

3. Điền từ chính xác: Khi làm bài điền từ, hãy chú ý giới hạn từ (NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS). Bạn phải lấy từ chính xác từ trong bài, không tự ý thay đổi dạng từ.
